purpose: Tracks AI_OS worker windows, worker roles, packet assignment, and safe routing state.
note: This file was never populated. Worker profiles live in AIOS_WORKER_PROFILES.json. Runtime worker state lives in AIOS_WORKER_REGISTRY.json.
rules: MAIN CONTROL receives normal ChatGPT commands.
SHELL WORKER runs validators, inspections, and helper scripts only.
CODEX WORKER receives Codex prompts/tasks only.
No worker may commit or push unless explicitly approved.
